add-customername-text-field-to-pdf.title: Add Text Field "CustomerName" to PDF Page
add-customername-text-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a text form field named CustomerName to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

add-unchecked-checkbox-field-to-pdf-page.title: Add Unchecked Checkbox Field to PDF Page
add-unchecked-checkbox-field-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to insert an unchecked checkbox form field named 'AgreeTerms' on the second page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade.

add-radio-button-group-to-pdf.title: Add Radio Button Group to PDF Form
add-radio-button-group-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a three‑page PDF (if needed) and add a radio button group named "PaymentMethod" with "Credit" and "PayPal" options on page 3 using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add Submit Button to PDF Form
add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to add a submit button on page 1 of a PDF that posts form data to a specified URL using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-javascript-alert-to-pdf-push-button.title: Add JavaScript Alert to PDF Push Button
add-javascript-alert-to-pdf-push-button.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript alert to a push button named "ShowInfo" in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

decorate-pdf-form-field.title: Decorate PDF Form Field with Custom Border, Background, and Font
decorate-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to apply a custom border color, background shade, and font styling to a specific PDF form field.

apply-default-decoration-to-text-fields.title: Apply Default Decoration to All Text Fields
apply-default-decoration-to-text-fields.description: Shows how to configure a FormFieldFacade to set background, text, border colors and alignment for every text field in a PDF using FormEditor, then save the decorated document.

center-align-pdf-form-field.title: Center Align PDF Form Field Using FormEditor
center-align-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to set the horizontal alignment of a PDF form field to center using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

custom-signature-image-background.title: Set Custom Image Background for Signature Field
custom-signature-image-background.description: Demonstrates how to locate a signature field named "Signature" in a PDF and assign a custom appearance that uses an image as the background using Aspose.Pdf facades.

set-required-flag-on-pdf-form-field.title: Set Required Flag on PDF Form Field
set-required-flag-on-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with FormEditor, set a predefined field attribute (Required) using SetFieldAttribute, and save the modified document.

set-quantity-field-limit-pdf.title: Set Field Limit for Quantity in PDF Form
set-quantity-field-limit-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, using the FormEditor facade to set a character limit of 100 for the "Quantity" form field, and saving the modified document.

add-list-item-to-dropdown.title: Add List Item to Dropdown in PDF Form
add-list-item-to-dropdown.description: Shows how to add a new option to a combo box (dropdown) field in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

remove-list-item-from-pdf-form.title: Remove List Item from PDF Form Field
remove-list-item-from-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific list item (Option B) from a list form field named "Choices" in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

copy-field-value-source-to-target.title: Copy Field Value from SourceNotes to TargetNotes in PDF
copy-field-value-source-to-target.description: Shows how to read the value of a form field and write it to another field in the same PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

clone-and-rename-pdf-form-field.title: Clone and Rename PDF Form Field on Specific Page
clone-and-rename-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to copy the outer definition of a form field from a source PDF to a target PDF on page 5 and then rename the cloned field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

move-pdf-form-field.title: Move PDF Form Field to New Position
move-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to relocate a form field named "DateField" to specific coordinates (100,200) with size 150x20 on page 2 using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

remove-form-field-from-pdf.title: Remove a Form Field from a PDF
remove-form-field-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete an existing form field from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor and save the modified document.

rename-pdf-form-field.title: Rename PDF Form Field Using Aspose.Pdf.Facades
rename-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, rename a form field from OldName to NewName, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-email-validation-javascript-to-pdf-f.title: Add Email Validation JavaScript to PDF Form Field
add-email-validation-javascript-to-pdf-f.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript blur‑event script to the "Email" form field of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-fdf.title: Export PDF Form Fields to FDF
export-pdf-form-fields-to-fdf.description: Shows how to export all form fields from a PDF document to an FDF file using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class.

import-xfdf-data-into-pdf-form-fields.title: Import XFDF Data into PDF Form Fields
import-xfdf-data-into-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to import form field values from an XFDF file into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and save the updated document.

batch-add-hidden-guid-field-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Hidden GUID Field to PDFs
batch-add-hidden-guid-field-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over PDF files in a folder, add a hidden text field named "ProcessedDate" to each document, and fill it with a newly generated GUID using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-consistent-decoration-to-checkbox-.title: Apply Consistent Decoration to All Checkbox Fields in PDFs
apply-consistent-decoration-to-checkbox-.description: Shows how to batch‑process PDFs in a directory, set a visual facade for form fields, and apply that appearance to every checkbox field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-update-submit-button-urls.title: Batch Update Submit Button URLs in PDFs
batch-update-submit-button-urls.description: Shows how to process a directory of PDF files and change the URL of every form submit button to a new address using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

clear-and-populate-dropdown-list.title: Clear and Populate Dropdown List in PDF Form
clear-and-populate-dropdown-list.description: Demonstrates how to remove all existing items from a PDF dropdown (list box) field and add new values using Aspose.Pdf.

populate-pdf-list-box-with-countries.title: Populate PDF List Box with Country Names
populate-pdf-list-box-with-countries.description: Shows how to fill a PDF form list box field with all 195 country names using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

set-readonly-currency-field-appearance.title: Set Read‑Only Currency Field Appearance in PDF
set-readonly-currency-field-appearance.description: Demonstrates how to make a PDF form field read‑only, apply a printable appearance flag, and fill it with a currency‑formatted value using Aspose.Pdf.

attach-js-clear-discountcode-on-focus.title: Attach JavaScript to Clear DiscountCode Field on Focus
attach-js-clear-discountcode-on-focus.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor to add a JavaScript action that clears a form field when it receives focus, then saves the modified PDF.

copy-form-field-definitions.title: Copy Form Field Definitions from Template to PDF
copy-form-field-definitions.description: Shows how to copy form field definitions from a template PDF (FormTemplate.pdf) to another PDF (Invoice.pdf) using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

move-pdf-form-fields-by-offset.title: Move All PDF Form Fields by Offset
move-pdf-form-fields-by-offset.description: Shows how to shift every form field in a PDF document by a fixed (10,15) offset using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

batch-rename-pdf-form-fields.title: Batch Rename PDF Form Fields
batch-rename-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through all form fields in a PDF and rename those that start with a specific prefix using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

set-multiline-property-for-pdf-text-box.title: Set Multiline Property for PDF Text Box Field
set-multiline-property-for-pdf-text-box.description: Demonstrates how to enable multiline input for a text box form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-custom-border-thickness-for-pdf-form.title: Set Custom Border Thickness for PDF Form Field
set-custom-border-thickness-for-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to apply a 2‑point border to a specific PDF form field ("Signature") using FormEditor, and optionally set the field as read‑only.

set-form-field-background-color-light-gr.title: Set Form Field Background Color to Light Green
set-form-field-background-color-light-gr.description: Demonstrates how to change the background color of a PDF form field named "Status" to light green using FormEditor and FormFieldFacade.

add-hidden-sessionid-field-to-pdfs.title: Add Hidden SessionId Field to PDFs
add-hidden-sessionid-field-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑process PDF files, add a hidden text field named "SessionId" on the first page, and fill it with a generated GUID using Aspose.Pdf facades.

attach-javascript-validation-to-pdf-subm.title: Attach JavaScript Validation to PDF Submit Button
attach-javascript-validation-to-pdf-subm.description: Demonstrates how to add JavaScript to a push‑button field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to validate required fields before submitting the form.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export all form field definitions from a PDF document into a JSON file for external integration.

import-json-fields-to-pdf.title: Import JSON Field Definitions and Add Form Fields to a PDF
import-json-fields-to-pdf.description: Shows how to read form field definitions from a JSON file and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to create the corresponding fields in a newly created PDF document.

set-field-limit-phone-number.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Form Field
set-field-limit-phone-number.description: Shows how to limit the "PhoneNumber" form field to 15 characters in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

set-date-field-format-in-pdf-form.title: Set Date Field Format in PDF Form
set-date-field-format-in-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a date field (represented as a TextBoxField), assign a value formatted as MM/dd/yyyy, and save the updated document.

add-reset-form-button-to-pdf.title: Add Reset Form Button to PDF
add-reset-form-button-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a push button that clears all form fields in a PDF by attaching JavaScript using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-integer-score-field-in-pdf-form.title: Create Integer Score Field in PDF Form
create-integer-score-field-in-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to add a NumberField named "Score" to a PDF form and restrict its input to integer values between 0 and 100 using Aspose.Pdf.

attach-javascript-validation-to-age-fiel.title: Attach JavaScript Validation to Age Form Field
attach-javascript-validation-to-age-fiel.description: Demonstrates locating the "Age" form field in a PDF and attaching a JavaScript action that alerts the user when the entered value is less than 18.

copy-image-field-content-to-another-fiel.title: Copy Image Field Content to Another PDF Form Field
copy-image-field-content-to-another-fiel.description: Shows how to copy the inner content of an image form field (Logo) to another image field (HeaderLogo) in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

remove-empty-form-field.title: Remove Empty PDF Form Field
remove-empty-form-field.description: Shows how to check a PDF form field's value and delete the field with Aspose.Pdf if it contains no user input, otherwise preserving the document.

rename-pdf-form-fields-facades.title: Rename PDF Form Fields Using Aspose.Pdf Facades
rename-pdf-form-fields-facades.description: Demonstrates how to load a CSV mapping and rename form fields in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade. Includes creation of a sample PDF with a text box field if the source file is missing.

add-digital-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.title: Add Digital Signature Field and Sign PDF
add-digital-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.description: Demonstrates adding a signature field named "DigitalSignature" to a PDF, setting its visual appearance, and applying a PKCS#7 digital signature using a certificate.

set-form-field-required.title: Mark PDF Form Field as Required Using FormEditor
set-form-field-required.description: Shows how to set a PDF form field as required (adds an asterisk indicator) by using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor and PropertyFlag.

apply-arial-bold-font-to-pdf-text-fields.title: Apply Arial Bold Font to All PDF Text Form Fields
apply-arial-bold-font-to-pdf-text-fields.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to set a custom font for every text form field in a PDF document.

batch-add-selectall-checkbox-to-first-pa.title: Batch Add SelectAll Checkbox to First Page of PDFs
batch-add-selectall-checkbox-to-first-pa.description: Shows how to loop through PDFs in a folder and use Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade to add a checkbox field named "SelectAll" to the first page of each document, then save the updated files.

move-footer-note-to-bottom-margin.title: Move FooterNote Field to Bottom Margin on Each PDF Page
move-footer-note-to-bottom-margin.description: Shows how to copy an existing form field to a new location at a fixed bottom margin on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

format-price-field-two-decimals-appearan.title: Format Price Field with Two Decimals and Apply Appearance
format-price-field-two-decimals-appearan.description: Fills the PDF form field "Price" with a value formatted to two decimal places and then applies a visual appearance (right‑aligned text) using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

attach-javascript-to-quantity-field.title: Attach JavaScript to PDF Form Field to Calculate Total Price
attach-javascript-to-quantity-field.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, add a JavaScript action to the "Quantity" field that multiplies the value by a unit price and writes the result to the "TotalPrice" field, then save the updated document.

export-import-pdf-form-fields-xml.title: Export and Import PDF Form Fields via XML
export-import-pdf-form-fields-xml.description: Demonstrates how to export PDF form field values to an XML file for archival and later re‑import those values into a new PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

import-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.title: Import PDF Form Fields from XML While Preserving Field Order
import-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import form field values from an XML file using the Form facade, and save the updated PDF while keeping the original field order.

add-list-box-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add List Box Field to PDF Form
add-list-box-field-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to insert a ListBox form field named "Priority" with items Low, Medium, High and set Medium as the default value using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-button-fields-from-pdf-form.title: Remove Button Fields from PDF Form
remove-button-fields-from-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, identify all button form fields (push‑button, check‑box, radio‑button) and remove them using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor, then save the cleaned document.

rename-duplicate-pdf-form-fields.title: Rename Duplicate PDF Form Fields with Incremental Index
rename-duplicate-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to enumerate form fields in a PDF, detect duplicate names, and rename each duplicate by appending an incremental index using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-email-validation-script-to-pdf-form-.title: Add Email Validation Script to PDF Form Field
add-email-validation-script-to-pdf-form-.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript regular‑expression validation script to an "Email" form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade, then saves the updated document.

decorate-pdf-form-field-background-cente.title: Decorate PDF Form Field with Background and Centered Text
decorate-pdf-form-field-background-cente.description: Demonstrates how to set a background color and center-align text for a specific form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

add-hidden-numeric-version-field.title: Add Hidden Numeric Version Field to PDF
add-hidden-numeric-version-field.description: Shows how to insert a hidden numeric field named "Version" into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade.

copy-addressblock-to-billingaddress-page.title: Copy Form Field to New Field on Specific Page
copy-addressblock-to-billingaddress-page.description: Shows how to copy the outer definition of an existing PDF form field to a new field on a designated page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

move-pdf-form-field-to-specific-position.title: Move PDF Form Field to Specific Position
move-pdf-form-field-to-specific-position.description: Shows how to relocate the "Signature" form field to a defined rectangle on page 5 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

set-rich-text-formatting-for-pdf-form-fi.title: Set Rich Text Formatting for a PDF Form Field
set-rich-text-formatting-for-pdf-form-fi.description: Demonstrates how to enable rich‑text formatting for a PDF form field by configuring a FormFieldFacade and applying it with FormEditor.

add-javascript-populate-date-field.title: Add JavaScript to Populate Date Field on PDF Open
add-javascript-populate-date-field.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF form that sets the "Date" field to the current date when the document is opened, using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

export-checkbox-fields-to-fdf.title: Export Checkbox Field Definitions to FDF
export-checkbox-fields-to-fdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export form data from a PDF into an FDF file, which can later be filtered for checkbox fields.

import-checkbox-fdf-merge-pdf.title: Import Checkbox Definitions from FDF and Merge into PDF
import-checkbox-fdf-merge-pdf.description: Shows how to import checkbox definitions/values from an FDF file into an existing PDF form and save the merged document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-populate-state-combobox.title: Add and Populate a Combo Box with US State Abbreviations
add-populate-state-combobox.description: Shows how to create a PDF in memory, add a ComboBox form field, and fill it with US state abbreviations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-non-whitelisted-items-from-pdf-li.title: Remove Non-Whitelisted Items from a PDF List Field
remove-non-whitelisted-items-from-pdf-li.description: Demonstrates how to delete list items from a PDF form field that are not present in a predefined whitelist using Aspose.Pdf.

set-taxrate-readonly-calc-js.title: Set TaxRate Field to Read‑Only and Calculate via JavaScript
set-taxrate-readonly-calc-js.description: Shows how to make a PDF form field read‑only and attach JavaScript that calculates its value from the Subtotal field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

decorate-list-fields-uniform-style.title: Decorate List Fields with Uniform Border and Background
decorate-list-fields-uniform-style.description: Demonstrates applying a consistent background color, border color, style, and width to all list box and combo box fields in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

rename-pdf-form-fields-camelcase.title: Rename PDF Form Fields to camelCase
rename-pdf-form-fields-camelcase.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over all form fields in a PDF and rename each field to follow the camelCase naming convention using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

add-print-button-with-javascript.title: Add Print Button with JavaScript to PDF
add-print-button-with-javascript.description: Shows how to insert a push‑button form field into a PDF and attach JavaScript that opens the print dialog using Aspose.Pdf.

hide-form-field-exportable.title: Hide Form Field While Keeping It Exportable
hide-form-field-exportable.description: Shows how to make a PDF form field invisible in the viewer using FormEditor while still allowing its value to be submitted with the form data.

copy-notes-to-summary.title: Copy Notes Field to Summary in PDF Form
copy-notes-to-summary.description: Shows how to read the value of a PDF form field (Notes) and copy it to another field (Summary) using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

shift-form-fields-on-pdf-page.title: Shift Form Fields on a Specific PDF Page
shift-form-fields-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to move all form fields and page content on page 2 of a PDF 5 points to the right using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

restrict-discount-field-two-decimal.title: Restrict Discount Field to Two-Decimal Numbers in PDF Form
restrict-discount-field-two-decimal.description: Demonstrates how to limit a PDF form's Discount field to numeric input with two-decimal precision using Aspose.Pdf's NumberField and FormEditor with JavaScript validation.

add-confirmation-dialog-to-pdf-submit-bu.title: Add Confirmation Dialog to PDF Submit Button
add-confirmation-dialog-to-pdf-submit-bu.description: Demonstrates how to attach JavaScript to a PDF form submit button using Aspose.Pdf to show a confirmation dialog before posting the form.

add-gender-radio-button-group.title: Add Gender Radio Button Group to PDF Form
add-gender-radio-button-group.description: Demonstrates how to add a radio button group named "Gender" with options Male, Female, Other and a default selection to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

remove-temporary-form-fields.title: Remove Temporary Form Fields from PDF
remove-temporary-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to locate and delete form fields whose names start with "Temp_" in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, then save the cleaned document.

set-address-field-auto-wrap-dynamic-heig.title: Enable Auto‑Wrap and Dynamic Height for Address Field
set-address-field-auto-wrap-dynamic-heig.description: Loads a PDF, converts the single‑line "Address" form field to a multiline textbox, enables word‑wrap, and configures the field to automatically fit text and expand vertically.

add-hidden-authtoken-field-to-pdf.title: Add Hidden AuthToken Field to PDF
add-hidden-authtoken-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to generate a secure token and insert it as a hidden form field in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

duplicate-pdf-form-field.title: Duplicate PDF Form Field Using FormEditor
duplicate-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to copy an existing form field named "Signature" to a new field "SignatureCopy" on the same page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

move-logo-field-top-left.title: Move 'Logo' Form Field to Top‑Left Corner of PDF
move-logo-field-top-left.description: Shows how to reposition a PDF form field named 'Logo' to the top‑left corner of the first page with a defined width and height using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-input-mask-pdf-form-field.title: Set Input Mask for PDF Form Field via Custom Attribute
set-input-mask-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to assign an input mask to a PDF form field by storing the mask as a custom attribute using the FormEditor facade and setting a default value with the Form class.

attach-js-reset-button-clear-hidden-fiel.title: Attach JavaScript to Reset Button to Clear Hidden Fields
attach-js-reset-button-clear-hidden-fiel.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf to add JavaScript to a PDF form's reset button so that the form is reset and hidden fields are cleared.

export-pdf-form-field-layout-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Field Layout to JSON
export-pdf-form-field-layout-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to read form fields from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, extract their page coordinates, and write the layout information to a JSON file for UI reconstruction.

import-field-layout-from-json.title: Import Field Layout from JSON and Add Form Fields to PDF
import-field-layout-from-json.description: Shows how to deserialize a JSON layout describing form fields, create the necessary PDF pages, and place the fields using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.
